source: Press Information Bureau (PIB) — Government of India — March 2026
headline: India's total petroleum reserves provide 60 days cover despite SPR limitations
body: India maintains a total reserve capacity of approximately 74 days of crude oil and petroleum product requirements, with current stock cover at around 60 days. This includes crude oil stored in strategic petroleum reserves (SPR) underground caverns (9.5 days), commercial storage held by refineries and oil marketing companies, crude oil in transit on ships, and product inventories. The government has activated emergency procurement protocols to further strengthen reserves.
